**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Required Information:**
 - Occurs On: [e.g, https://www.gta5-mods.com/vehicles/2024-lamborghini-lanzador-add-on-template]
 - Log File: [upload the latest.log under logs directory]
